name: Absorb Soul
description: Down an ally in range 5 and steal their mana. It doesn't get injured. (Castable once per turn.)
description2: Down any ally and steal their mana. It doesn't get injured. (Castable once per turn.)

name: Blood Geyser
description: Take damage equal to half of your max HP, then deal that much damage and inflict Fear 2 on another unit.
description2: Take damage equal to half of your max HP, then deal that much damage and inflict Fear 2 on units in an area.

name: Blood Rain
description: Take 1 damage and heal all allies 1 HP.
description2: Take 1 damage, heal all allies 1 HP and give them +1 mana.

name: Bloodletting
description: Remove all status effects from another unit, then inflict Bleed 5 on it.
description2: Remove all status effects from another unit, then inflict Bleed 5 on it. (This spell costs less.)

name: Carrion Shot
description: Deal 1 damage and inflict Leech 1. This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.
description2: Deal 2 damage and inflict Leech 2. This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.

name: Clew of Leeches
description: Surround a unit with Leeches.
description2: Surround a unit with beefy Leeches.

name: Coffin Flop
description: Jump to an open tile in range 2. This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed. When downed you can land on units dealing damage and inflicting Madness.
description2: Jump to an open tile in range 3. This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed. When downed you can land on units anywhere dealing damage and inflicting Madness 2.

name: Curse
description: Give a unit -4 Luck.
description2: Give a unit -4 Luck. (This spell has increased range)

name: Dark Ritual
description: Destroy an adjacent body. The next spell you cast costs 0 mana.
description2: Destroy an adjacent body. The next 2 spells you cast cost 0 mana.

name: Dark Step
description: Teleport to an open tile.
description2: Teleport to a tile. If you teleport into a unit you both take 5 damage, then inflict Fear on it.

name: Death Bloom
description: Explode a body, dealing damage and Knockback to adjacent units.
description2: Explode a body, dealing damage and Knockback to units in a large area.

name: Debone
description: Deal damage and inflict Weakness on an adjacent unit. If you have no weapon, equip a bone.
description2: Deal damage, inflict Weakness and Immobile on an adjacent unit. If you have no weapon, equip a bone.

name: Decompose
description: Explode a body and spawn 3 Leeches.
description2: Explode a body and spawn 5 Leeches.

name: Demonic Pact
description: Injure yourself and take an extra turn. (This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)
description2: Injure yourself and take an extra turn. (This spell costs less. This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)

name: Dig Up the Dead
description: Dig to any tile and unearth 4 zombies.
description2: Dig to any tile and unearth 4 zombies. (This spell costs less.)

name: Donate Blood
description: Heal a unit 5 HP, then take 10 damage. Castable while you're downed. If you do, take no damage and give what you heal All Stats Up.
description2: Heal all units in an area 5 HP, then take 10 damage. Castable while you're downed. If you do, take no damage and give what you heal All Stats Up.

name: Eternal Servitude
description: Resurrect an enemy body to full HP. It joins your team.
description2: Resurrect an enemy body to full HP. It joins your team and takes an extra turn after this one.

name: Evil Incarnate
description: Inflict Fear on all enemies.
description2: Inflict Fear 1 and Weakness 2 on all enemies.

name: Feed
description: Destroy an adjacent body. Your basic attack inflicts +1 Leech for the rest of the battle.
description2: Destroy a body at range. Your basic attack inflicts +1 Leech for the rest of the battle.

name: Flatline
description: Down yourself. You don't get injured. Spawn a shadow copy of yourself that fades after its first turn. The copy can't cast this ability or give extra turns to units.
description2: Down yourself. You don't get injured. Spawn a shadow copy of yourself that fades after its first turn. The copy can't cast this ability or give extra turns to units. (This spell costs 0 mana.)

name: Flesh Golem
description: You and all allies lose 10 HP. Summon a flesh golem with one random spell from each of those units. (Castable once per battle.)
description2: You and all allies lose 10 HP. Summon a flesh golem with one random spell and random passives from each of those units. (Castable once per battle.)

name: Forbidden Famine
description: Inflict Weakness 5, Poison 2, and Madness 2 on all enemies. There are permanent consequences for casting this spell… but maybe not for you. (Castable once per battle.)
description2: Inflict Leech 2, Weakness 5, Poison 2, and Madness 2 on all enemies. There are permanent consequences for casting this spell… but maybe not for you. (Castable once per battle.)

name: Full Moon
description: Give Lifesteal 1 to units in an area.
description2: Give Lifesteal 3 to units in an area.

name: Giga Drain
description: Spend all of your mana, then drain that much HP from an adjacent unit. Ignores shield.
description2: Spend all of your mana, then drain that much HP from a unit in range 3. Ignores shield.

name: Go Limp
description: Until your next turn, you won't get injured if you're downed.
description2: Until your next turn, you won't get injured if you're downed. When downed, inflict Confusion 10 on the unit that downed you.

name: Gravecrawl
description: Dig to any tile and unearth a body.
description2: Dig to any tile and unearth 1-3 bodies. (This spell costs less.)

name: Hush
description: Inflict Sleep 1 on an adjacent unit.
description2: Inflict Sleep 1 on a unit in range 4.

name: Leech Swarm
description: Inflict Leech 3 on all units, except yourself.
description2: Inflict Leech 1 on each allied unit and Leech 3 on all other units, except yourself.

name: Leeches
description: Inflict Leech 1 on a unit.
description2: Inflict Leech 1 and Mana Leech 1 on a unit.

name: Lifedrain
description: Drain 2 HP at melee range. This spell is much stronger and castable while you're downed. If this kills a unit, revive with 50% hp.
description2: Drain 2 HP at melee range. This spell is much stronger and castable while you're downed. If this kills a unit, revive with max hp.

name: Mass Psychosis
description: Inflict Madness on all enemies.
description2: Inflict Madness on all enemies. (This spell costs less.)

name: Pestilence
description: Deal 1 damage to all units.
description2: Deal 1 damage to all units. (This spell costs less.)

name: Reanimate
description: Resurrect a body to half HP. It becomes a Zombie and joins your team.
description2: Resurrect a body to full HP. It becomes a Zombie and joins your team.

name: Reap
description: Teleport into a unit with 5 or less health and destroy it.
description2: Teleport into a unit with 10 or less health and destroy it. (This spell costs less.)

name: Reaper Step
description: Teleport to an open tile in range 1. Whenever a unit dies, this spell's range increases by 1.
description2: Teleport to a tile in range 1, dealing damage to units you land on. Whenever a unit dies, this spell's range and damage increase by 1.

name: Rebirth
description: Teleport into a body, destroying it to heal 4 HP, gain +1 Intelligence and +1 Constitution.
description2: Teleport into a body, destroying it to heal 4 HP and gain All Stats Up.

name: Replace
description: Teleport into a familiar and destroy it. Refresh your basic attack.
description2: Teleport into a familiar and destroy it. Refresh your basic attack and heal 5 HP.

name: Scare
description: Teleport in front of an enemy then Knockback each adjacent unit 4 tiles.
description2: Teleport in front of an enemy then inflict Knockback 4 and Fear on each adjacent unit.

name: Seance
description: Spawn a ghost Familiar that fades after its first turn. Castable while you're downed. If you do, spawn a shadow copy of yourself instead.
description2: Spawn a ghost Familiar that fades after its second turn. Castable while you're downed. If you do, spawn a shadow copy of yourself instead.

name: Seppuku
description: Down yourself.
description2: N/A (cannot be upgraded)

name: Shriek
description: Inflict Fear 1, Confusion 2, and Madness 2 on units within a cone.
description2: Inflict Fear 1, Confusion 2, Madness 2 and drain 2 HP from units within a cone.

name: Slit Wrists
description: Deal 2 damage to yourself.
description2: N/A (cannot be upgraded)

name: Soul Link
description: Inflict Soul Link on units in an area.
description2: Inflict Soul Link on units in a large area.

name: Soul Transfer
description: Give a unit +1 Constitution and heal it 4 HP. You gain -1 Constitution and lose 4 health.
description2: Give a unit +1 Constitution and heal it 4 HP. You gain -1 Constitution and lose 4 health. This spell can revive units. If the unit revived was an enemy it gets charmed for the battle.

name: Spider Egg
description: Inflict Infested 1 on a unit in range 3.
description2: Deal 1 damage and inflict Infested 1 on any unit.

name: Summon Bones
description: Summon a skeleton from a body.
description2: Summon a skeleton from a body, anywhere. (This spell costs less.)

name: Summon Shade
description: Spawn a shadow copy of yourself that fades after its first turn. (The copy can't cast this ability or give extra turns to units.)
description2: Spawn a shadow copy of yourself that fades after its second turn. (The copy can't cast this ability or give extra turns to units.)
unlock: Complete The Caves with the Necromancer

name: Trade Life
description: Swap HP with an ally in range 3. Castable while you're downed. If this spell downs you or the ally, neither are injured.
description2: Swap HP with any ally. Castable while you're downed. If this spell downs you or the ally, neither are injured.

name: Unearth
description: Dig up a body. It reanimates at the end of the round.
description2: Dig up a body. It reanimates at the end of the round. (This spell costs less.)

name: We Are One
description: Inflict Soul Link on yourself and every enemy.
description2: Inflict Soul Link on yourself and every enemy. Gain +2 Constitution and heal 8 HP.

name: Weakness
description: Inflict Weakness 5 on a unit.
description2: Give a unit Weakness 5 and All Stats Down.

name: Whisper
description: Inflict Fear and Madness on an adjacent unit.
description2: Inflict Fear 1 and Madness 2 on a unit in range 4.
